title: Map all references to a symbol before moving it
description: Find every definition and use of a symbol across source, tests, docs, and generated artifacts before a rename or move.
body: Use when preparing a rename or move of a shared symbol. Actions: resolve all definitions and references across source, tests, configuration, docs, and any generated or string-based usages (reflection, DI keys, serialized names), and report the full reference set with locations. Do not rely on a plain text grep that misses dynamic or generated references. This skill exposes capability only and must not run repo-wide refactoring tools without runtime permission. Validation signals include a complete reference list and a clean build/test after the change. Risk boundary: missed dynamic or string-keyed references break at runtime, not compile time; if references cannot be fully resolved, report the move as higher-risk.
